description: 1. Extremely light weight, approximately 150gEasy to carry, use as it comes with a tight lid and also with a safety latch to prevent leaks and spills3. Solvent-free, anti-flaking inner coating4. 100% recyclableSupport environment conservation by using this 100% recyclable sipper! This water bottle is trendy, attractive and you can carry it everywhere with you easily. This ultra light water sipper is a deal for fitness enthusiasts to carry while training and exercising.
